description: Reference tasks selected from ICSI and AMI meeting corpora. Used as calibration examples in the multi-agent prompt to guide task extraction quality.

tasks.title: Fix synchronization bug in audio channels
tasks.description: Identify and resolve the glitch causing channels to become asynchronous during recording, ensuring accurate audio transcription.
acceptanceCriteria: All audio channels remain synchronized throughout the recording session
No timing drift detected between channels after extended recording periods
Transcription accuracy is not degraded by channel misalignment

tasks.title: Define XML schema for Bayes-net input
tasks.description: Create an XML schema that specifies permissible structures for input into the Bayes-net, including situation nodes and their attributes.
acceptanceCriteria: XML schema validates all required situation node types and attributes
Schema enforces correct structure for Bayes-net input format
Existing Bayes-net modules can parse documents conforming to the schema

tasks.title: Write unit tests for recognition scripts
tasks.description: Develop unit tests for the recognition scripts that will be used on Meeting Recorder digits.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests cover all critical recognition script functions
Tests validate correct digit recognition output for known input samples
Test suite can be executed as part of the CI pipeline

tasks.title: Implement information retrieval using THISL tools
tasks.description: Develop a command line tool for indexing and querying meeting data, allowing users to input keywords and retrieve start-end times of relevant segments.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can index meeting transcripts via command line
Keyword search returns accurate start-end timestamps of matching segments
Tool handles large transcript datasets without performance degradation

tasks.title: Optimize transition probabilities in HMM
tasks.description: Adjust the self-loop transition probabilities in the HMM to improve recognition rates based on recent findings.
acceptanceCriteria: Transition probabilities are updated based on empirical findings
Recognition rate improves compared to the previous configuration
No regression in recognition accuracy for existing test cases

tasks.title: Design REST API for remote control functions
tasks.description: Create a REST API to manage remote control functionalities, including on/off, channel change, and volume control.
acceptanceCriteria: API endpoints exist for on/off, channel change, and volume control
API follows RESTful conventions with proper HTTP methods and status codes
API documentation is complete and includes request/response examples

tasks.title: Integrate voice recognition software
tasks.description: Incorporate voice recognition functionality into the remote control system.
acceptanceCriteria: Voice commands are recognized with acceptable accuracy rate
System responds to voice commands within 2 seconds
Voice recognition module integrates with existing control flow without conflicts

tasks.title: Implement intuitive user interface for remote control
tasks.description: Develop a user interface that is simple and intuitive, minimizing the number of buttons to reduce confusion.
acceptanceCriteria: Interface uses minimal button count while maintaining all essential functions
User testing shows reduced confusion compared to the previous layout
Navigation between functions requires no more than 2 steps

tasks.title: Integrate screen and speech recognition
tasks.description: Combine the screen functionality with speech recognition capabilities for the remote control.
acceptanceCriteria: Screen displays feedback when speech recognition is active
Voice commands trigger corresponding screen updates in real-time
Both modules function correctly when used simultaneously

tasks.title: Optimize VAD for latency reduction
tasks.description: Reduce VAD processing time to achieve a latency of 220 milliseconds.
acceptanceCriteria: VAD processing latency is reduced to 220ms or below
No degradation in voice activity detection accuracy
Performance improvement is validated under real-time processing conditions
